calendar.matters:
Notice Of Motion On Petition To Quash Subpoena
Off Calendar Feb-26-2015 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling. As to PETITIONERS WIKIMEDIA FOUNDATION, INC., JOHN DOE 1, JOHN DOE 2, AND JOHN DOE 3'S Petition To Quash Subpoena, the substance of the petition as to Doe 1 is moot. Petitioner is the prevailing party as to Does 2 and 3. Respondent shall pay sanctions to petitioner in the amount of $17,500. ORDER SIGNED. Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith; Clerk: Sean Kane; Reporter: Paula J. Shi, CSR #13358 (302/EHG)

Notice Of Motion On Petition To Quash Subpoena
Off Calendar Feb-06-2015 Continued To Feb-26-15 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES: PETITIONERS WIKIMEDIA FOUNDATION, INC. AND JOHN DOE'S PETITION TO QUASH SUBPOENA.

Appearances: Benjamin H. Kleine of Cooley LLP (415.693.2022) for petitioners and moving parties; Matt Kumin of the Law Office of Matthew Kumin (415.655.7494) for respondent and opposing party

Counsel do not stipulate to the matter being decided by the Judge Pro Tem. The matter is argued and continued to February 26, 2015 at 9:30 am to be heard in department 302. Judge Pro Tem: Katherine Huibonhoa, Clerk: E. Larnauti, Not Reported

Notice Of Motion On Petition To Quash Subpoena
Off Calendar Jan-30-2015 Continued To Feb-06-15 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance. The tentative ruling is adopted. PETITIONERS WIKIMEDIA FOUNDATION, INC., JOHN DOE's Petition To Quash Subpoena is continued on the Court's motion to February 6, 2015 at 9:00 am in Department 302. Judge Pro Tem: Robert Kane; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Not reported.

Notice Of Motion On Petition To Quash Subpoena
Off Calendar Dec-17-2014 Continued To Jan-30-15 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances on Wednesday, December 17, 2014. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows: PETITIONERS WIKIMEDIA FOUNDATION, INC.'S and JOHN DOE'S Motion On Petition To Quash Subpoena is continued to January 30, 2015 per ex parte order.
